scripts.lint: eslint . --max-warnings=0 && npm run lint:boundaries --silent && npm run lint:migrations --silent && npm run lint:blocked-artifacts --silent
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && npm run test:types --silent && vitest run && node --test services/http-gateway/__tests__/*.test.mjs services/retorno/__tests__/*.test.mjs tests/contract/*.test.mjs tests/certificado/*.test.mjs tests/golden/*.test.mjs tests/handler/*.test.mjs tests/observability/*.test.mjs tests/operations/*.test.mjs tests/pki/*.test.mjs tests/property/*.test.mjs tests/returns/*.test.mjs tests/xml/*.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: npm run build --silent && vitest run && node scripts/coverage-check.mjs
scripts.cdk:synth: npm run templates:generate --silent && npm --workspace @esocial/cdk run cdk -- synth --all --output cdk.synth.out
scripts.cdk:synth:qualification: npm run templates:generate --silent -- --stage qualification && npm --workspace @esocial/cdk run cdk -- synth esocial-qualification --output cdk.synth.out -c stage=qualification
scripts.cdk:synth:restricted-production: npm run templates:generate --silent -- --stage restricted-production && npm --workspace @esocial/cdk run cdk -- synth esocial-restricted-production --output cdk.synth.out -c stage=restricted-production
scripts.cdk:synth:production: node -e "if (process.env.ESOCIAL_PROD_CONFIRM !== '1') { console.error('ESOCIAL_PROD_CONFIRM=1 is required for production CDK synth.'); process.exit(1); }" && npm run templates:generate --silent -- --stage production && npm --workspace @esocial/cdk run cdk -- synth esocial-production --output cdk.synth.out -c stage=production
scripts.test:integration: npm run build --silent && npm run templates:check --silent && node --test tests/integration/*.test.mjs tests/integration/localstack/*.test.mjs tests/integration/retry/*.test.mjs tests/observability/*.test.mjs tests/soap/*.test.mjs
